utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format includes 6 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Now checking the final package:
1. destination: Specified as 'Lisbon, Portugal' – fully covered.
2. travel_dates: Specified as '2024-10-05 to 2024-10-09' – fully covered.
3. transportation: Includes flight details (airline, class, times, baggage, cancellation, total cost) – fully covered.
4. accommodation: Includes hotel name, type, stars, rating, location, amenities, breakfast, wifi, total cost – fully covered.
5. activities: Includes name, type, duration, difficulty, environment, equipment, guide, total cost – fully covered.
6. additional_services: Includes insurance, payment due date, cancellation deadline – fully covered.
7. total_budget: Includes total spent, budget limit, remaining – fully covered.
All 6 required items (destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget) are fully detailed and complete.
